title: Nanosuit
description: A mod that crappily adds the iconic armor from the Crysis game
body:
### **This mod has been made with MCreator**



This mod adds the iconic alien tech suit from the game Crysis (the first one to be specific)



_**Features Including:**_

- Selection of suit modes between armor, stealth, speed and strength
- Gui with buttons to switch between modes (R by default)
- Automatic sleep of unused modes for power saving
- More energy consumption when moving fast with stealth mode (tho the difference is really small)



**_A Few Things I Couldn't Do_**

- MCreator sqiushed my png's whenever i tried to make a custom energy display so it is a text based display instead
- The strength mode consumes power as long as its on since there where severe desync issues when made to consume power only when you attack
- The armor mode consumes a fixed amount of energy per attack, this i couldn't make consume depending on damage cuz that is the limit of mcreator for 1.12.2. Instead the suit makes you pretty much immune to all damage as long as you aren't under constant damage

-----

I promised a friend that i would fix the broken mod i left behind years ago that i made with mcreator for 1.12.2. So here we are. This mod will not recieve any updates for 1.12.2 unless its some gamebreaking bug that i can fix. But i may rewrite it for 1.19+ at some point after i'm finished with my current projects



This is the best i could get while using mcreator. Some stuff works weirdly and there are a few desync issues but it at least works. And i'm not gonna try to write it using java in 1.12.2 as the game code looks like some alien language in these old versions, so this is pretty much the best version you'll get outta me for 1.12.2
